name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new skill, rule, MCP tool, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Type

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] New rule
- [ ] New MCP tool
- [ ] Improvement to existing component
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Feature Description

Describe the feature or improvement you'd like to see.

## Use Case

What problem does this solve? How would you use it?

## Docker Commands / APIs

If this involves Docker functionality, which commands or APIs are relevant?

## Additional Context

Any other context, references, or examples.
